flags.concern: Final video availability: the plan gates the section with `useVideoOutputs` from `useShotImages`, but this repository's final-video UI reads from `shot_final_videos`, not generic video rows in `shot_generations`. Using `useVideoOutputs` can show the accordion for non-final video rows or hide it when `shot_final_videos` is the only source of truth.
flags.evidence: `fetchParentGenerations()` loads final-video parents from `shot_final_videos` in `/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/shared/hooks/segments/segmentOutputsQueries.ts:15-35`, while `selectVideoOutputs()` in `/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/shared/lib/shotImageSelectors.ts:41-42` only filters any `GenerationRow` whose `type` contains `video`. Those are different datasets.

flags.concern: Final video deletion path: step 6 proposes wiring `FinalVideoSection` delete through `useRemoveImageFromShot` or a generic generation delete, but the existing shot editor does neither. Clearing a final video in this codebase updates the `generations` row and deletes non-original variants; reusing `useRemoveImageFromShot` would only null `shot_generations.timeline_frame` and leave the final output itself intact.
flags.evidence: The current final-video delete handler in `/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/travel-between-images/components/ShotEditor/hooks/editor-state/useImageManagement.ts:72-109` clears `generations.location` / `thumbnail_url` and removes variants. By contrast, `useRemoveImageFromShot()` in `/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/shared/hooks/shots/useShotGenerationMutations.ts:122-171` only updates `shot_generations.timeline_frame` to `NULL`.
